item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-mobile-number","requestedField":"mobile_number","summary":"The OpenAPI schema is the source of truth and the checked-in client is deterministically generated from it. I found no repository-specific AGENTS.md instructions; I’m adding mobile_number as a non-required string and extending the client test to verify both presence and optionality.","commandsRun":["pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '!node_modules' -g '!vendor' | sort && rg --files -g '!node_modules' -g '!vendor' | sed -n '1,160p'","sed -n '1,240p' package.json; sed -n '1,280p' scripts/generator-core.ts; sed -n '1,240p' scripts/generate-client.ts; sed -n '1,280p' tests/client.test.ts; sed -n '1,240p' api/openapi.yaml; sed -n '1,260p' generated/api-client.ts; sed -n '1,160p' src/index.ts; git status --short"]}

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-mobile-number","requestedField":"mobile_number","summary":"The normal generator command is blocked by this sandbox because tsx cannot create its IPC socket. I’m rerunning the same generator module through Node’s tsx import hook, which avoids that socket, then I’ll execute the tests.","commandsRun":["pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '!node_modules' -g '!vendor' | sort && rg --files -g '!node_modules' -g '!vendor' | sed -n '1,160p'","sed -n '1,240p' package.json; sed -n '1,280p' scripts/generator-core.ts; sed -n '1,240p' scripts/generate-client.ts; sed -n '1,280p' tests/client.test.ts; sed -n '1,240p' api/openapi.yaml; sed -n '1,260p' generated/api-client.ts; sed -n '1,160p' src/index.ts; git status --short","pnpm generate:api && pnpm test"]}
